requirements.text: Provide a Scenario Runner UI with a selectable scenario type (success, validation_error, system_error, slow_request), optional name input, run button, loading state, and result toast.
Display run history of the latest 20 scenario runs with type, status, duration, timestamp, status-colored badges, and auto-refresh behavior.
Expose observability guidance links in UI for Grafana, Sentry, and Loki query usage.
Implement POST /api/scenarios/run that handles success, validation_error (400), system_error (500/unhandled), and slow_request (2-5s delay), persisting every run in ScenarioRun.
Expose GET /metrics in Prometheus format with scenario_runs_total, scenario_run_duration_seconds, and http_requests_total using required labels.
Emit structured JSON logs for scenario runs including timestamp, level, message, context, scenarioType, scenarioId, duration, and error when applicable.
Integrate Sentry so system_error events are captured as exceptions; validation_error breadcrumbs are optional; DSN must come from environment variable.
Provide a Grafana dashboard with at least 3 panels: runs by type, latency distribution, and error rate; optional Loki logs panel.
Extend Docker Compose with Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, and Promtail (or Docker log driver), and ensure startup works via docker compose up -d.
System must support a 5-minute verification walkthrough end-to-end without reading source code.
All four required scenario types must be operable from the UI and reflected in persisted data and observability outputs.
Optional easter-egg support: teapot scenario returns HTTP 418 with signal payload and persists metadata.easter=true.

features.title: UI Scenario Runner
features.description: A form-driven UI to execute scenario runs with selectable type, optional name, mutation handling, loading, and toast feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: User can select one of: success, validation_error, system_error, slow_request.
User can optionally provide a name.
Run button triggers request via mutation and shows loading state.
Toast displays success or error result.

features.title: UI Run History
features.description: A recent-run list showing run metadata and visual status feedback with automatic updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows latest 20 runs.
Each row includes type, status, duration, timestamp.
Status badge color maps to state (green/yellow/red).
List refreshes automatically (interval or mutation invalidation).

features.title: UI Observability Links
features.description: A helper block that points users to Grafana, Sentry, and Loki usage.
acceptanceCriteria: Includes Grafana dashboard link/hint.
Includes Sentry dashboard hint.
Includes Loki query hint: {app="signal-lab"}.

features.title: Backend Scenario Execution API
features.description: A scenario execution endpoint that processes scenario behaviors and persists run records.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/scenarios/run accepts { type, name? }.
success returns completed status with id and duration.
validation_error returns HTTP 400 with message.
system_error triggers HTTP 500/unhandled exception path.
slow_request delays 2-5 seconds before success path.
Every run is stored in ScenarioRun.
Optional teapot scenario returns HTTP 418 with required payload and metadata.

features.title: Prometheus Metrics Endpoint
features.description: Metrics exposure for scenario and HTTP telemetry in Prometheus format.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /metrics returns valid Prometheus text format.
scenario_runs_total counter exists with labels type,status.
scenario_run_duration_seconds histogram exists with label type.
http_requests_total counter exists with labels method,path,status_code.

features.title: Structured Logging to Loki
features.description: JSON logs are emitted for scenario processing and shipped to Loki.
acceptanceCriteria: Logs are JSON structured.
At least one log is emitted per scenario run.
Logs include scenarioType, scenarioId, duration, and error when relevant.
Logs are queryable in Loki.

features.title: Sentry Error Tracking
features.description: Sentry is configured to capture unhandled/system failures and optionally breadcrumbs for validation errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Sentry SDK is initialized.
system_error run is captured as exception in Sentry.
validation_error breadcrumb support is available (optional).
DSN is configured via environment variable and placeholder exists in .env.example.

features.title: Grafana Dashboard
features.description: A provisioned (or importable) dashboard visualizing scenario and error behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard includes Scenario Runs by Type panel.
Dashboard includes Latency Distribution panel.
Dashboard includes Error Rate panel.
Prometheus datasource is configured.
Optional Loki logs panel can be included.

features.title: Docker Compose Observability Stack
features.description: Compose configuration includes observability services and boots reliably for demo verification.
acceptanceCriteria: Compose includes prometheus, grafana, loki, promtail (or log driver alternative).
Prometheus scrapes backend /metrics.
Grafana has relevant datasources and dashboard provisioning/import path.
System starts successfully with docker compose up -d.

constraints: Frontend form must use React Hook Form.
Frontend data mutations/queries must use TanStack Query.
UI feedback components should use shadcn (toast, badge).
Backend must expose POST /api/scenarios/run and GET /metrics.
Scenario run records must persist to PostgreSQL via ScenarioRun (Prisma model).
Prometheus metric names/labels are fixed as specified.
Logs must be structured JSON and include scenario observability fields.
Sentry DSN must be environment-driven (not hardcoded).
Observability stack must run under Docker Compose and be demo-ready.
dependencies: PRD 001 project foundation and existing Docker Compose baseline

plan.title: Core module and endpoint scaffolding
plan.details: Keep existing ScenarioModule, MetricsModule, and baseline routes as foundation; no net-new scaffolding required.

plan.title: Harden ScenarioRun persistence schema
plan.details: Update ScenarioRun fields/indexes for required run fields and optional teapot metadata.

plan.title: Finalize scenario run behavior
plan.details: Ensure success/validation_error/system_error/slow_request behaviors and persistence are complete.

plan.title: Ensure history API contract for latest 20 runs
plan.details: Align history response shape for UI consumption.

plan.title: Align Prometheus metrics with PRD labels/names
plan.details: Verify metric names and labels match PRD.

plan.title: Complete structured logging and Sentry behavior
plan.details: Enforce JSON log shape and Sentry capture rules.

plan.title: Build/finish Scenario Runner interaction
plan.details: Add form fields, loading state, toast, and mutation wiring.

plan.title: Implement run history panel with auto-refresh
plan.details: Render latest 20 runs with badges and auto refresh.

plan.title: Add observability guidance links section
plan.details: Provide guidance links for Grafana, Sentry, and Loki.

plan.title: Finalize Grafana dashboard provisioning
plan.details: Ensure at least 3 required panels and data source wiring.

plan.title: Write 5-minute end-to-end verification walkthrough
plan.details: Create operator runbook for full demo verification.

plan.title: Optional teapot scenario feature flag path
plan.details: Add optional HTTP 418 teapot flow with metadata persistence.

skipReason.P0: Scenario and metrics backend scaffolding already exists in the current codebase.
skipReason.P9: Docker Compose already includes Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, and Promtail services.

failed.error: P1001 Can't reach postgres:5432; migration SQL created manually but not applied against live DB.

database.summary: Schema, migrations, and ORM usage are compliant.

backend.summary: Swagger, metrics, logging, exceptions, and Sentry 5xx capture are compliant.

frontend.summary: TanStack Query, RHF+zodResolver, shadcn usage, and loading/error states are compliant.
